description: Deterministic operator: on a /shutdown message it calls the system_power tool to power off the host. Wired to a 00:00 WIB scheduler trigger. Real shutdown only fires when the host is ARMED (env FLOWORK_POWER_ARMED=1); otherwise it dry-runs.
author: @flowork-os

exposes_rpc.name: handle_message
exposes_rpc.description: Power off the host computer. Trigger with /shutdown.
